name: duokai2-desktop
description: Duokai2 desktop app for local browser profile management and multi-environment testing.
author: jj

scripts.prepare:desktop-assets: node scripts/prepare-desktop-assets.mjs && node scripts/prepare-playwright-browsers.mjs && electron-builder install-app-deps
scripts.build: npm run prepare:desktop-assets && tsc -b && vite build && ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache/electron-builder CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.build:dir: npm run prepare:desktop-assets && tsc -b && vite build && ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache/electron-builder CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs --dir
scripts.build:mac: npm run prepare:desktop-assets && tsc -b && vite build && ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache/electron-builder CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.build:win: npm run prepare:desktop-assets && tsc -b && vite build && electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis zip --publish never
